title: Flamingo - Software update for just charge case
scenario: Independent DFU update for charging case only, without updating headset firmware, via separate Update button on Software Update tab
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Locate your connected device and tap the Update button on the device card.
3. On the Software Update tab, verify that separate "Update" buttons are displayed for the headset and the charging case, along with an "Update All" button.
4. Tap the "Update" button next to the charging case.
5. Follow the on-screen prompts to complete the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process for the charging case.
expected: The DFU process completes successfully for only the charging case. The headset remains on its current firmware version without being updated.
